workflows.name: jira-ticket-created
workflows.goal: A new Jira ticket was created. Check the description quality and give feedback. Notify the team on Discord with the ticket summary and feedback. Create a feature branch in GitHub named after the ticket ID. Create a linked GitHub issue with the ticket details.

workflows.name: github-pr-opened
workflows.goal: A new GitHub pull request was opened. Notify the team on Discord with the PR title, author, and link.
